title: Acisanthera uniflora
taxonomy: Acisanthera uniflora is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. This plant is native to tropical Africa. The classification of Acisanthera uniflora includes being a member of the genus Acisanthera, which is further classified under the order Lamiales. Acisanthera uniflora's classification also includes being a member of the kingdom Plantae and the phylum Angiospermophyta. Further classification includes being a member of the class Magnoliopsida.
